title: Project skeleton
body:
Goal: create the Maven project layout and base package structure.

Acceptance Criteria:
- pom.xml targets Java 17 and JUnit 5
- src/main/java and src/test/java exist
- mvn test runs without errors

title: Domain model
body:
Implement DigitalId aggregate, status, history, and restrictions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Immutable attributes enforced
- Status history recorded on transitions
- Restriction model supports optional periods

title: Repository layer
body:
Create repository interface and in-memory implementation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- CRUD operations supported
- Lookup by id and nationalId
- Tests cover repository behavior

title: Authorization rules
body:
Restrict mutations to CentralAuthority only.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Unauthorized operations rejected with clear errors
- Negative cases covered

title: Identity management
body:
Implement create, update, and status change flows.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Invalid transitions rejected
- Updates on revoked IDs rejected
- Deterministic handling of repeats

title: Verification rules
body:
Implement per-organisation verification rules.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Tax period suspension check
- Driving restriction check
- Immigration hold check
- Bank/Employer validity-only response

title: Audit log
body:
Record key actions in an audit log.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Entries for create, update, status change, verification
- Actor and timestamp included

title: CLI demo
body:
Build console runner demonstrating key workflows.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Runs from main()
- Clear, structured output

title: CI pipeline
body:
Add GitHub Actions workflow to build and test.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Workflow runs on push and PR
- mvn test executes successfully

title: README
body:
Write usage and architecture overview.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Run instructions
- Architecture summary and packages
- Repo link included

title: Video script
body:
Draft concise demo outline and talking points.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Covers architecture, workflows, tests, CI
- Under 10 minutes

title: Unit test suite
body:
Implement JUnit 5 tests for core business rules.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Each org rule has positive and negative test
- Status history and restriction periods tested
